message:
test(packs/kubernetes/kustomize): block coverage for piped/`-k` deletes

src/packs/kubernetes/kustomize.rs:
- New `kustomize_blocks_piped_delete` covers both pipe shapes the
  pack flags as destructive:
  - `kustomize build ./overlays/prod | kubectl delete -f -`
  - `kubectl kustomize ./overlays/prod | kubectl delete -f -`
  Both should match the `kustomize` reason.
- New `kustomize_blocks_kubectl_delete_k` covers
  `kubectl delete -k <dir>` — the directory variant of the kustomize
  delete pattern.
- New `kustomize_blocks_with_correct_severity` pins the
  `Severity::Critical` level for both shapes so a future severity
  reclassification gets caught.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
